action: cat /tmp/password.txt | while read -r p; do unzip -P "$p" confidential_data.zip && echo "Password found: $p" && break; done
for p in $(seq -w 0 9999); do unzip -P "$p" confidential_data.zip && echo "Password found: $p" && break; done
cat /tmp/password.txt /tmp/password_uri.txt | sort -u | while read -r p; do unzip -P "$p" confidential_data.zip && echo "Password found: $p" && break; done
tshark -r /tmp/traffic.pcap -Y "http" -T fields -e http.request.body -e http.request.uri -e http.host -e http.user_agent | grep -oE '[0-9]{4}' > /tmp/password_candidates.txt
cat /tmp/password_candidates.txt | while read -r p; do unzip -P "$p" confidential_data.zip && echo "Password found: $p" && break; done

tshark -r /tmp/traffic.pcap -Y "http" -T fields -e http.cookie | grep -oE '[0-9]{4}' > /tmp/password_cookie.txt
cat /tmp/password.txt /tmp/password_uri.txt /tmp/password_candidates.txt /tmp/password_cookie.txt | sort -u | while read -r p; do unzip -P "$p" confidential_data.zip && echo "Password found: $p" && break; done

tshark -r /tmp/traffic.pcap -Y "http" -T fields -e http.request -e http.response -e http.cookie -e http.user_agent -e http.host -e http.authorization | grep -oE '[0-9]{4}' | sort -u | while read -r p; do unzip -P "$p" confidential_data.zip && echo "Password found: $p" && break; done

tshark -r /tmp/traffic.pcap -Y "http" -T fields -e http.request.headers -e http.request.body | grep -oE '[0-9]{4}' > /tmp/password_all.txt
cat /tmp/password_all.txt | sort -u | while read -r p; do unzip -P "$p" confidential_data.zip && echo "Password found: $p" && break; done
for p in $(seq -w 0 9999); do 7z x confidential_data.zip -p"$p" -y > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "Password found: $p" && break; done
